name: CHOP
short_description: CHOP is a 2D party game with tons of gore and fast-paced action. Swords will fly, bodies will be chopped, friendships will break !
detailed_description:
How to play online ?



Even though online multiplayer is not officially supported, you can play CHOP online with your friends using Parsec.
It's free, very easy and you can play any local multiplayer/coop game online, even old games on emulators !

1. Download the client from . Run it and create an account. Get your friends to do the same.
2. If you want to host, click "Create a party" at the top left (you need Windows 10 to host). Launch CHOP on Steam in windowed mode.
3. In Parsec, enable CHOP in the approved apps. Set the game name and public/private setting.
4. To join a friend who's hosting, add him using his Parsec username. Once he accepted your friend request, click on his username, then click "join", then "play"
5. Host : run the game, and friends can play just like they're sitting next to you !

If you have any issues with Parsec, contact them on their discord here :


Berserker Edition

The Berserker edition includes :

  • The full game
  • An exclusive skin for each character
  • Official Digital Artbook
  • Official Digital Soundtrack


About the Game


Eager to get back to the golden age of local multiplayer games ? Want to crush your friends after practicing hard on a skill-based and competitive game ? We've got the game for you.

CHOP is a visceral game where bloody killings meet ultra fast action.
With easily accessible games mechanics, it offers a real strategic dimension and a depth of gameplay that will put your skills to the test.

One hit to kill, respawn almost instantly. CHOP gives you a feeling close to the constant adrenaline rush you can experience in a fast FPS.



Blood and guts in a world torn asunder, with a comic book vibe : it's for anyone who likes gore, comics, post-apo, and who's looking for a supercharged party game.

Up to four players can play at a time. Challenge your friends one-on-one or enter the fray. You can even team up and play two-on-two, or one vs. three if you've got the guts for it.

Are you up for the goriest couch game for your pizza/beers party ?

Rush Out :

The game offers a unique twist with this mode.
Here, no matter how many players you kill.
Your goal is to rush out through your portal as fast as possible. Don't worry, you still need to kill, as it's the only way to open the portal.
It closes if you die, so you'll be under a lot of pressure when it comes to escaping.
Don't mess around, just kill someone and rush out !

  • From 1 to 4 player local multiplayer
  • Glorious dismemberments, delightful executions, silly gory graphics all wrapped up in a comic book style.
  • 3 game modes
  • Tournament mode available for each game mode
  • 4 playable characters
  • 4 special abilities
  • Same hitbox and basic skills = perfect balancing
  • Blistering moves
  • Various arenas
  • Random bonuses to spice up battles
  • Many options to customize your games

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
